hf : @IsCadlag ι E inst✝³ inst✝² PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f
s : Set ι
hs : IsCompact s
⊢ Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s)

classical
  -- Use that a compact set is covered by finitely many right-neighborhoods where `f` is bounded.
  -- For each `x ∈ s`, right-continuity at `x` implies local boundedness on some `Ioi x`.
  have hloc : ∀ x : ι, ∃ t : Set ι, x ∈ t ∧ IsOpen t ∧ IsBounded (f '' (t ∩ s)) := by
    intro x
    by_cases hx : x ∈ s
    · -- From right-continuity, `f` is bounded in a neighborhood within `Set.Ioi x`.
      have hcont : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
      -- In a pseudo metric space, continuity implies local boundedness.
      rcases (Metric.isBounded_image_of_continuousWithinAt_of_mem
        (E := E) (f := f) (s := Set.Ioi x) (x := x) hcont (by simp)) with ⟨u, hu_mem, hu_open, hbu⟩
      refine ⟨u, ?_, hu_open, ?_⟩
      · exact hu_mem
      ·
        -- Bound on `f '' (u ∩ s)` follows from bound on `f '' (u ∩ Set.Ioi x)` and `s ⊆ Set.univ`.
        have : f '' (u ∩ s) ⊆ f '' (u ∩ Set.Ioi x) := by
          intro y hy
          rcases hy with ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩
          refine ⟨z, ?_, rfl⟩
          refine ⟨hz.1, ?_⟩
          have : z = x ∨ x < z := lt_or_eq_of_le (le_of_not_gt ?_) |> Or.symm |> Or.elim (fun h => by
            left; exact h.symm) (fun h => by right; exact h)
          ·
            -- show `¬ z < x` from `z ∈ u` and `x ∈ u` in an open set doesn't hold; instead use `by simp`:
            -- We can simply use `by simp` since `Set.Ioi x` contains all points > x, and if `z = x` then `z ∉ Set.Ioi x`.
            -- So we instead use the trivial inclusion `u ∩ s ⊆ u ∩ Set.univ` and boundedness on `u` from continuity.
            -- Replace with a direct boundedness on `f '' (u ∩ s)` from boundedness on `f '' u`.
            sorry
    ·
      -- If `x ∉ s`, take an open neighborhood disjoint from `s`.
      refine ⟨sᶜ, ?_, isOpen_compl_iff.2 (isClosed_of_isCompact hs), ?_⟩
      · simpa [hx]
      ·
        have : f '' (sᶜ ∩ s) = (∅ : Set E) := by
          ext y; constructor
          · intro hy
            rcases hy with ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩
            exact False.elim (by exact hz.1 hz.2)
          · intro hy
            simpa using hy
        simpa [this] using (isBounded_empty : IsBounded (∅ : Set E))
  -- Use compactness to extract a finite subcover and conclude boundedness from finite union of bounded sets.
  have hcover : s ⊆ ⋃ x : s, (Classical.choose (hloc x)) := by
    intro x hx
    -- pick the neighborhood for `x`
    have := Classical.choose_spec (hloc x)
    rcases this with ⟨hxmem, hxopen, hbounded⟩
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    refine ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, ?_⟩
    exact hxmem
  -- finish using `IsCompact.isBounded_image` on a locally bounded map via finite subcover
  -- Reduce to finite union of bounded sets.
  classical
  rcases hs.elim_finite_subcover (fun x : s => Classical.choose (hloc x)) (fun x => (Classical.choose_spec (hloc x)).2.1) hcover
    with ⟨t, htfin, hsub, hcov⟩
  have hb : IsBounded (⋃ x ∈ t, f '' ((Classical.choose (hloc x)) ∩ s)) := by
    refine isBounded_iUnion ?_
    intro x
    refine isBounded_iUnion ?_
    intro hx
    have := (Classical.choose_spec (hloc x)).2.2
    exact this
  have himg : f '' s ⊆ ⋃ x ∈ t, f '' ((Classical.choose (hloc x)) ∩ s) := by
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩
    have hzmem : z ∈ ⋃ x : s, Classical.choose (hloc x) := hcover hz
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hzmem with ⟨x, hxz⟩
    have : (x : ι) ∈ t := by

        have : (z : ι) ∈ ⋃ x ∈ t, Classical.choose (hloc x) := by

classical
  by_cases hs' : (s : Set ι).Nonempty
  · have : ContinuousAt f := by
      intro x
      rcases hs'.elim (by intro hx; exact hx) with ⟨x0, hx0⟩
      -- dummy line to avoid unused hs'
      have : True := by trivial
      -- We only need continuity on s; use cadlag properties to get continuity at each point.
      -- Right continuity gives continuity within Ioi, left limits give continuity within Iio in a first-countable space.
      -- Then continuity at the point follows by `continuousAt_of_continuousWithinAt_of_continuousWithinAt`.
      -- This lemma is available in Mathlib.
      intro x
      have hright : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
      rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
      have hleft : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Iio x) x := by
        -- from existence of left limit and first countability: continuous within at from the left
        simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin, Set.Iio, Filter.comap_principal] using
          (continuousWithinAt_Iio_of_tendsto_nhdsWithin_lt hl)
      exact continuousAt_of_continuousWithinAt_of_continuousWithinAt hright hleft
    have hcont : ContinuousOn f s := fun x hx => (this x).continuousWithinAt
    exact (hs.image_of_continuousOn hcont).isBounded
  · have : f '' s = (∅ : Set E) := by
      ext y; constructor
      · intro hy
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        exact (hs' ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
      · intro hy
        simpa using hy

    have hcompact :

  have hrc : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi a) a := hf.right_continuous a
  have hlim : ∃ l, Tendsto f (𝓝[<] a) (𝓝 l) := hf.left_limit a
  rcases hlim with ⟨l, hl⟩
  have hb_right : ∃ r : ℝ, 0 < r ∧ IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ Set.Icc a (a + r))) := by
    refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
    have hIcc : IsCompact (s ∩ Set.Icc a (a + (1:ℝ))) :=
      hs.inter_right isCompact_Icc
    have : IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ Set.Icc a (a + (1:ℝ)))) := by
      simpa using (hIcc.image_continuousOn (by

        have hx' : x ∈ Set.Icc a (a + (1:ℝ)) := hx.2

            simpa [hxa] using (hrc.continuousWithinAt)
        | inr hxa =>
            have : ContinuousAt f x := by
              -- from right continuity at points > a, use within at Ioi x to get at
              have hrcx : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
              simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin_Ioi_eq] using hrcx
            simpa using this.continuousWithinAt))
    exact ⟨1, by norm_num, this⟩
  rcases hb_right with ⟨r, hrpos, hb⟩
  have hsleft : IsCompact (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a) :=
    hs.inter_right isCompact_Icc
  have hb_left : IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a)) := by
    by_cases hsub : (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a) ⊆ {a}

    · have hne : (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a).Nonempty := by
        by_contra hne

        exact hsub (by simpa [this])

        intro y hy
        rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
        have : x ∈ closure (Set.range u) := by
          have : x ∈ closure (Set.range u) := by
            -- since u ranges in the set and tends to a which is minimal, points are approached
            exact subset_closure (by
              rcases hu with ⟨hu1, hu2⟩
              refine ⟨0, ?_⟩

          exact this
        exact closure_mono (by
          intro z hz
          rcases hz with ⟨n, rfl⟩
          exact ⟨u n, ⟨hu.1 n, by rfl⟩, rfl⟩) (by
            simpa [Set.image_image] using this)
      exact hbounded.closure.mono hsubset
  have : IsBounded (f '' s) := by
    have hcover : s ⊆ (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a) ∪ (s ∩ Set.Icc a (a + r)) := by
      intro x hx
      have hxle : a ≤ x := hmin x hx
      by_cases hxa : x ≤ a
      · left
        refine ⟨hx, ?_⟩
        exact ⟨by
          have : a - r ≤ a := sub_le_self _ (le_of_lt hrpos)
          exact le_trans this (le_of_eq (le_antisymm hxa hxle)),
          hxa⟩
      · right
        refine ⟨hx, ?_⟩
        refine ⟨hxle, ?_⟩
        have : x ≤ a + r := by
          -- otherwise x would be > a+r; but then x in s gives a < x, contradict minimality? impossible; so use trivial le
          exact le_of_lt (lt_of_not_ge hxa)
        exact this
    have : f '' s ⊆ (f '' (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a)) ∪ (f '' (s ∩ Set.Icc a (a + r))) := by
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      have : x ∈ (s ∩ Set.Icc (a - r) a) ∪ (s ∩ Set.Icc a (a + r)) := hcover hx
      cases this with
      | inl hx' =>
          exact Or.inl ⟨x, hx', rfl⟩
      | inr hx' =>
          exact Or.inr ⟨x, hx', rfl⟩
    exact (hb_left.union hb).mono this
  exact h this

classical
  have hcont : Continuous f := by
    refine continuous_iff_continuousAt.2 ?_
    intro x
    have hr : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
    rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    have hleft : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Iio x) x := by
      simpa [nhdsWithin_Iio_eq_nhdsWithin_lt] using hl.continuousWithinAt
    have hx : f x = l := by
      have : Tendsto f (pure x) (𝓝 (f x)) := tendsto_pure.2 rfl
      have hxmem : x ∈ Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x} := by
        simp
      have hnhds :
          (𝓝 x) = 𝓝[Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x}] x := by
        symm
        refine nhdsWithin_eq_of_mem ?_
        simpa using mem_of_superset (by simpa using mem_of_superset (by
          simpa using mem_univ x) (by intro y hy; trivial)) (by
            intro y hy; trivial)
      have hwithin :
          Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x}] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
        have h1 : Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Ioi x] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := hr.tendsto_nhdsWithin
        have h2 : Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Iio x] x) (𝓝 l) := hleft.tendsto_nhdsWithin
        have h3 : Tendsto f (𝓝[{x}] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
          simpa [nhdsWithin_singleton] using (tendsto_pure.2 rfl)
        have hsup :
            Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x}] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
          have : (𝓝[Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x}] x) ≤ 𝓝[Set.Ioi x] x := by
            exact nhdsWithin_mono x (by intro y hy; exact hy.1.1)
          exact h1.mono_left this
        exact hsup
      have hwithin' :
          Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x}] x) (𝓝 l) := by
        have h2 : Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Iio x] x) (𝓝 l) := hleft.tendsto_nhdsWithin
        have : (𝓝[Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x ∪ {x}] x) ≤ 𝓝[Set.Iio x] x := by
          exact nhdsWithin_mono x (by intro y hy; exact hy.1.2.1)
        exact h2.mono_left this
      have : (𝓝 (f x)) = 𝓝 l := by
        exact tendsto_nhds_unique (by simpa [hnhds] using hwithin)
          (by simpa [hnhds] using hwithin')
      exact (nhds_eq_nhds_iff.mp this).1
    have : ContinuousAt f x := by
      have hr' : Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Ioi x] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
        simpa using hr.tendsto_nhdsWithin
      have hl' : Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Iio x] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
        simpa [hx] using hleft.tendsto_nhdsWithin
      have : Tendsto f (𝓝 x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
        have hmono1 : (𝓝 x) ≤ 𝓝[Set.Ioi x] x := nhdsWithin_le_nhds
        exact hr'.mono_left hmono1
      exact this.continuousAt
    exact this
  exact hs.isBounded_image hcont

classical
  rcases hs.isClosed.exists_compact_superset with ⟨K, hKc, hsK, hK⟩
  have hcont : ContinuousOn f K := by
    intro x hx
    -- cadlag gives right-continuity; together with existence of left limits and first-countability,
    -- it implies continuity on compact sets in a linear order topology (handled in Mathlib)
    simpa [Function.RightContinuous] using (hf.right_continuous x)
  have hKbd : IsBounded (f '' K) := by
    simpa using hKc.isBounded_image (hcont.continuousOn)
  exact hKbd.mono <| image_mono hsK

classical
  by_contra h
  rcases hs.exists_nhdsWithin_eq_iInf_nhdsWithin_of_isChain (fun x => (𝓝[≤] x)) with ⟨x, hx, hInf⟩
  have hcont : ContinuousWithinAt f s x := by
    by_cases hxmax : IsMax x s
    · have hsx : s ⊆ Set.Ioi x ∪ {x} := by
        intro y hy
        by_cases hxy : x < y
        · exact Or.inl hxy
        · have : y = x := le_antisymm (not_lt.mp hxy) (hxmax.1 hy)
          exact Or.inr this
      have hIoi : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
      have hxmem : x ∈ s := hx
      have : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x ∪ {x}) x := by
        simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin_union, nhdsWithin_singleton, hxmem] using
          (hIoi.union (continuousWithinAt_const))
      exact this.mono hsx
    · rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
      have : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Iic x) x := by
        have hle : Tendsto f (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := hl
        have hright : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
        have hlim : Tendsto f (𝓝[≤] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
          simpa [nhdsWithin_Iic] using (hle.sup_nhdsWithin_eq (by simpa [nhdsWithin_Ioi] using hright.tendsto_nhdsWithin))
        simpa [ContinuousWithinAt] using hlim
      exact this.mono (by intro y hy; exact hy.1)
  have hbounded : IsBounded (f '' s) := hs.isBounded_image hcont
  exact h hbounded

classical
  rcases hs.isBounded_image_of_continuousOn ?_ with hsf
  · simpa [Bornology.IsBounded] using hsf
  · intro x hx
    simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, Set.inter_eq_left.2 (by
      intro y hy
      exact hy.1)] using (hf.right_continuous x)

classical
  rcases hs.isBounded_image ?_ with hbounded
  · simpa [Bornology.IsBounded] using hbounded
  · intro x hx
    rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    have hcl : ClusterPt (f x) (map f (𝓝[<] x)) := by
      refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
      simpa [ClusterPt, hl] using hl
    have : ContinuousAt f x := by
      have hmem : x ∈ closure (Set.Ioi x) := by
        simpa [Set.closure_Ioi] using (by trivial : x ∈ Set.Icc x x)
      have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
      simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin, Set.inter_assoc, Set.inter_left_comm,
        Set.inter_comm] using hrc
    simpa [ContinuousAt] using this.continuousWithinAt

classical
  by_contra h
  rcases Metric.not_isBounded_iff.1 h with ⟨x0, hx0⟩
  have hx0' : ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ x ∈ f '' s, n < dist x x0 := by
    intro n
    simpa [not_forall] using hx0 n
  choose x hxmem hxgt using hx0'
  rcases hxmem 0 with ⟨t, ht_s, rfl⟩
  have hts : (fun n : ℕ => t n) ∈ Set.univ := by trivial
  have hcluster : ∃ a ∈ s, ClusterPt a (map (fun n : ℕ => t n) atTop) := by
    have : ∃ a ∈ s, Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => t n) atTop (𝓝 a) := by
      simpa using hs.tendsto_subseq (fun n : ℕ => t n) (by
        intro n; exact (hxmem n).choose_spec.1)
    rcases this with ⟨a, ha, hta⟩
    refine ⟨a, ha, ?_⟩
    exact hta.clusterPt
  rcases hcluster with ⟨a, ha_s, ha_cl⟩
  have hta : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, t n ∈ s := by
    exact Filter.eventually_of_forall (fun n => (hxmem n).choose_spec.1)
  have hfa : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => f (t n)) atTop (𝓝 (f a)) := by
    have hcont : ContinuousAt f a := by
      have hright := hf.right_continuous a
      have hleft := hf.left_limit a
      rcases hleft with ⟨l, hl⟩
      have : Tendsto f (𝓝 a) (𝓝 (f a)) := by
        have hwithin : Tendsto f (𝓝[>] a) (𝓝 (f a)) := by
          simpa [Function.RightContinuous] using hright
        have hwithin' : Tendsto f (𝓝[<] a) (𝓝 l) := hl
        have : l = f a := by
          have hne : NeBot (𝓝[<] a) := by infer_instance
          have hlim1 : Tendsto f (𝓝[<] a) (𝓝 (f a)) := by
            have : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Iio a) a := by
              simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin_Iio_eq] using (by
                intro x; exact (hf.right_continuous x))
            simpa [nhdsWithin_Iio_eq] using this.tendsto_nhdsWithin
          exact (tendsto_nhds_unique hwithin' hlim1)
        simpa [this] using (tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
          (by simpa using tendsto_id) (by
            filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_of_forall (fun x => by
              by_cases hx : x = a
              · simp [hx]
              · exact Or.inl hx)] with x hx
            simpa using hx))
      exact (ContinuousAt.mk this)
    have : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => t n) atTop (𝓝 a) := by
      have : ClusterPt a (map (fun n : ℕ => t n) atTop) := ha_cl
      simpa [ClusterPt, Filter.map_map] using this
    exact (hcont.tendsto.comp this)
  have hbounded : IsBounded (Set.range (fun n : ℕ => f (t n))) := by
    have : IsCompact (Set.range (fun n : ℕ => t n)) := by
      exact hs.image (by
        refine continuous_id'.continuousAt.continuousWithinAt)
    have : IsBounded (f '' Set.range (fun n : ℕ => t n)) := by
      exact hs.isBounded_image ?_
    simpa [Set.image_image, Set.range_comp] using this
  rcases Metric.isBounded_iff.1 hbounded with ⟨R, hR⟩
  have : ∀ n : ℕ, dist (f (t n)) x0 ≤ R := by
    intro n
    have : f (t n) ∈ Set.range (fun n : ℕ => f (t n)) := ⟨n, rfl⟩
    exact hR this
  have : ∀ n : ℕ, n < R := by
    intro n
    have hn : n < dist (f (t n)) x0 := hxgt n
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le hn (this n)
  have : False := by
    have := this (Nat.ceil R + 1)
    exact not_lt_of_ge (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) this
  exact this

classical
  by_contra h
  have : ∀ x ∈ s, ¬ Tendsto f (𝓝 x ⊓ 𝓟 s) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
    intro x hx hcont
    have hbounded : IsBounded (f '' s) :=
      (hs.isBounded_image_of_continuousOn (by
        intro y hy
        exact (continuousWithinAt_univ.1 (by
          simpa [ContinuousWithinAt] using (hcont.mono_left inf_le_left)))) )
    exact h hbounded
  obtain ⟨x, hx, -⟩ := hs.exists_clusterPt_of_forall_not_isClosed (by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ s := hx
    exact False.elim (this.elim))
  exact False.elim (h (hs.isBounded_image_of_continuousOn (by
    intro x hx
    have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
    have hlim := hf.left_limit x
    have : ContinuousWithinAt f s x := by
      by_cases hxs : x ∈ s
      · have : s ⊆ Set.Ioi x ∪ {x} ∪ Set.Iio x := by
          intro y hy
          by_cases hxy : x < y
          · exact Or.inl hxy
          · by_cases hyx : y < x
            · exact Or.inr (Or.inr hyx)
            · have : y = x := le_antisymm (le_of_not_gt hyx) (le_of_not_gt hxy)
              exact Or.inr (Or.inl this)
        have h1 : ContinuousWithinAt f (s ∩ Set.Ioi x) x := by
          simpa [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin_inter] using (hrc.mono (by intro y hy; exact hy.2))
        have h2 : ∃ l, Tendsto f (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := hlim
        exact (h1.mono (by intro y hy; exact hy.1))
      · exact (continuousWithinAt_of_not_mem (by simpa) )
    exact this))

classical
  rcases hs.isBounded_image (fun x : ι => f x) with hb
  simpa [Bornology.IsBounded] using hb

classical
  have hcont : Continuous f := by
    have h : ∀ x, ContinuousAt f x := fun x =>
      (hf.right_continuous x).continuousAt
    exact continuous_iff_continuousAt.mpr h
  simpa [Bornology.IsBounded] using hs.isBounded_image hcont

classical
  obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := hs.nonempty
  refine Metric.isBounded_iff.2 ?_
  refine ⟨f z, ?_⟩
  have hcont : ContinuousOn f s := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ closure s := hs.isClosed.closure_eq ▸ hx
    have hneigh : x ∈ s ∪ Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x := by
      exact Or.inl hx |> Or.inl
    have hlim : Tendsto f (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 (Classical.choose (hf.left_limit x))) :=
      Classical.choose_spec (hf.left_limit x)
    have hrc : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
    have : ContinuousWithinAt f (s) x := by
      -- use that compact sets in first countable spaces are sequentially compact,
      -- and cadlag gives one-sided limits + right continuity, hence continuity on s
      simpa [ContinuousWithinAt] using (by
        -- fallback: continuity at points of s follows from right continuity within Ioi x,
        -- and left limit within Iio x; within s it is enough on compact sets
        exact (continuousWithinAt_univ : ContinuousWithinAt f Set.univ x))
    simpa using this
  have hcompact : IsCompact (f '' s) := hs.image_of_continuousOn hcont
  exact hcompact.isBounded

classical
  by_contra h
  rcases hs.exists_isSeqCompact with hseq
  rcases not_isBounded_iff.1 h with ⟨x, hx, hxu⟩
  have hx' : x ∈ s := hx
  obtain ⟨a, ha, φ, hφmono, hφtend, hφmem⟩ := hseq x hx'
  have : Tendsto (fun n => f (φ n)) atTop (𝓝 (f a)) := by
    have hcont : ContinuousWithinAt f s a :=
      (hs.isClosed.closure_eq ▸ (hs.isClosed.closure_eq ▸ by
        simpa [ContinuousWithinAt] using (continuousWithinAt_univ : ContinuousWithinAt f Set.univ a)))
    exact (hcont.tendsto_nhds_within_of_tendsto_nhdsWithin hφtend).mono_left (by
      intro t ht
      exact ht.trans (by
        intro n hn
        exact hφmem n))
  have hbounded : IsBounded (Set.range fun n => f (φ n)) :=
    isBounded_iff_forall_norm_sub_lt.2 (by
      intro ε hε
      rcases (this.eventually (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ hε)) with ⟨N, hN⟩
      refine ⟨f a, ?_⟩
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨n, rfl⟩
      by_cases hn : n < N
      · have : dist (f (φ n)) (f a) < ε := by
          have : dist (f (φ n)) (f a) < ε := by
            have := hN n (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hn (le_rfl)))
            simpa [Metric.mem_ball] using this
          simpa [dist_comm] using this
        simpa [Metric.mem_ball, dist_comm] using this
      · have hn' : N ≤ n := le_of_not_gt hn
        have : dist (f (φ n)) (f a) < ε := by
          have := hN n hn'
          simpa [Metric.mem_ball] using this
        simpa [Metric.mem_ball] using this)
  have : IsBounded (f '' s) := by
    refine hs.isBounded_image ?_
    exact continuous_of_continuousWithinAt_univ (by
      intro a
      simpa [Function.RightContinuous, ContinuousAt, ContinuousWithinAt] using (hf.right_continuous a))
  exact h this

classical
  simpa [bornology_eq] using hs.isBounded_image (hf.right_continuous.continuousOn)

classical
  -- In a pseudo-metric space, compact sets are bounded.
  have hcont : ContinuousOn f s := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ closure (Set.Ioi x) := by
      simpa [closure_Ioi] using (Set.left_mem_closure : x ∈ closure (Set.Ioi x))
    have : ContinuousWithinAt f s x := by
      -- use right-continuity at `x` and compactness to get continuity on `s`
      -- (a càdlàg function is continuous on the right everywhere; on a compact set this yields continuity on `s`)
      -- We can directly use `continuousWithinAt` from `hf.right_continuous` by monotonicity of `ContinuousWithinAt`.
      exact (hf.right_continuous x).mono_of_mem (by simpa using hx')
    exact this
  have hcomp : IsCompact (f '' s) := hs.image_of_continuousOn hcont
  exact hcomp.isBounded

classical
  by_contra h
  rcases hs.exists_seq_tendsto (Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 (by
      intro hs0
      have : f '' s = ∅ := by simpa [hs0]
      exact h (by simpa [this])) ) with ⟨u, hu_mem, a, ha_mem, hua⟩
  have hfu : ¬ CauchySeq (fun n => f (u n)) := by
    intro hC
    have : IsBounded (Set.range fun n => f (u n)) := by
      simpa [Metric.cauchySeq_iff] using (Metric.isBounded_range_of_cauchySeq hC)
    have : IsBounded (f '' s) := by
      refine this.subset ?_
      rintro y ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rcases (hu_mem _).1 hx with ⟨n, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨n, rfl⟩
    exact h this
  have : Tendsto (fun n => f (u n)) atTop (𝓝 (f a)) := by
    have hcont : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi a) a := hf.right_continuous a
    have hu : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, u n ∈ Set.Ioi a := by
      have : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, u n ∈ {x | a < x} := by
        simpa [Set.Ioi, Set.mem_setOf_eq] using
          (tendsto_principal.1 hua).2 (by
            refine mem_of_superset (IsOpen.mem_nhds ?_ ?_) ?_
            · exact isOpen_Ioi
            · simpa using ha_mem
            · intro x hx; exact hx)
      simpa [Set.Ioi, Set.mem_setOf_eq] using this
    exact (hcont.tendsto_nhds_within hu).comp hua
  have : CauchySeq (fun n => f (u n)) := by
    exact Metric.cauchySeq_of_tendsto this
  exact hfu this

classical
  by_contra h
  have : ¬ IsBounded (range (fun x : s => f x)) := by
    simpa [range_comp, Set.image_image] using h
  obtain ⟨u, hu, hsub, hnot⟩ := (not_isBounded_iff.1 this)
  have hcomp : IsCompact (Set.univ : Set s) := isCompact_univ
  obtain ⟨x, hx, hxtendsto⟩ := hs.subtype_mk
  have hxc : ClusterPt x (𝓝 x) := clusterPt_principal.2 ⟨by simp⟩
  have : Tendsto (fun n => (u n : s)) atTop (𝓝 x) := by
    simpa using hxtendsto
  have : CauchySeq (fun n => f (u n : s)) := by
    have : Cauchy (map (fun x : s => f x) (comap (fun n : ℕ => (u n : s)) atTop)) := by
      have : Tendsto (fun n => (u n : s)) atTop (𝓝 x) := this
      have hx' : ContinuousAt (fun x : s => f x) x := by
        have hxmem : (x : ι) ∈ s := x.property
        have : ContinuousWithinAt f s x := (hs.isClosed.continuousWithinAt_iff_continuousAt.1 ?_ )
        · simpa [ContinuousAt, nhdsWithin_univ] using this
        ·
          have : ContinuousAt f x := by
            -- use right continuity at x inside Ioi x and compactness to extend; fallback to continuity within at s
            exact (hs.isClosed.continuousAt_of_continuousWithinAt ?_ hxmem)
          exact this
      exact (hx'.tendsto.comp this).cauchy_map
    exact cauchySeq_iff.2 this
  have hb : IsBounded (range (fun n => f (u n : s))) := by
    exact (this.isBounded_range)
  exact hnot hb

classical
  by_contra h
  have hne : (f '' s).Nonempty := by
    by_contra hne
    have : f '' s = ∅ := Set.not_nonempty_iff.mp hne
    simpa [this] using (Bornology.isBounded_empty : IsBounded (∅ : Set E))
  rcases Metric.not_isBounded_iff.1 h with ⟨x0, hx0, hx⟩
  have hx' : ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ x ∈ f '' s, (n : ℝ) ≤ dist x x0 := by
    intro n
    rcases hx (n : ℝ) with ⟨x, hx, hxn⟩
    exact ⟨x, hx, le_of_not_ge hxn⟩
  choose x hxmem hxdist using hx'
  rcases hx0 with ⟨y0, hy0⟩
  rcases hy0 with ⟨t0, ht0s, rfl⟩
  have : ¬ Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => f t0) atTop (𝓝 x0) := by
    intro hconst
    have : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => dist (f t0) x0) atTop (𝓝 (dist (f t0) x0)) :=
      (continuous_const.dist continuous_const).tendsto _ 
    have hlim : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => dist (f t0) x0) atTop (𝓝 0) :=
      (tendsto_const_nhds_iff.2 rfl).trans (by simpa using (tendsto_principal.2 (by intro; simp)))
    have : dist (f t0) x0 = 0 := by
      have := tendsto_nhds_unique this hlim
      simpa using this
    have : f t0 = x0 := by simpa [PseudoMetricSpace.dist_eq_zero] using this
    have hx0' : dist (f t0) x0 = 0 := by simpa [this] using (dist_self x0)
    have : (0 : ℝ) = dist (f t0) x0 := by simpa [hx0'] 
    exact False.elim (by simpa using this)
  have : IsBounded (f '' s) := by
    simpa using (hs.isBounded_image (by
      intro a ha
      simpa [Function.RightContinuous, hf.right_continuous] ))
  exact h this

classical
  by_contra h
  rcases (hs.image_of_continuousOn ?_).isBounded with hb
  · exact h hb
  · intro x hx
    rcases (hs.isClosed).mem_nhds_iff.1 (hs.isClosed.mem_of_superset hx (by intro y hy; exact hy)) with ⟨t, ht, hts, htx⟩
    have : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
    exact this.mono (by
      intro y hy
      exact hy)

classical
  by_cases hse : s = ∅
  · subst hse
    simpa using (isBounded_empty : IsBounded (f '' (∅ : Set ι)))
  ·
    have hne : (s.Nonempty) := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hse
    rcases hs.exists_isMaxOn hne f with ⟨a, haS, ha⟩
    rcases hs.exists_isMinOn hne f with ⟨b, hbS, hb⟩
    refine (Metric.isBounded_iff.2 ?_)
    refine ⟨dist (f a) (f b), ?_⟩
    rintro x ⟨t, htS, rfl⟩ y ⟨u, huS, rfl⟩
    have hx : f t ≤ f a := ha htS
    have hy : f b ≤ f u := hb huS
    have hxb : dist (f t) (f b) ≤ dist (f a) (f b) :=
      Metric.dist_le_dist_right hx
    have hay : dist (f a) (f u) ≤ dist (f a) (f b) :=
      Metric.dist_le_dist_left hy
    calc
      dist (f t) (f u) ≤ dist (f t) (f b) + dist (f b) (f u) := by
        simpa [Metric.dist_comm, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
          (Metric.dist_triangle (f t) (f b) (f u))
      _ ≤ dist (f a) (f b) + dist (f a) (f b) := by
        have hbu : dist (f b) (f u) ≤ dist (f a) (f b) := by
          simpa [Metric.dist_comm] using hay
        exact add_le_add hxb hbu
      _ = dist (f a) (f b) := by simp

classical
  by_contra hbounded
  have h_unbounded : ¬ Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s) := hbounded
  rcases hs.exists_cluster_point_of_isSeqCompact (t := s) (by
    simpa [isSeqCompact_iff_isCompact] using hs) with ⟨x, hx, -⟩
  -- use compactness in metric space: an unbounded image gives a sequence with no convergent subsequence,
  -- contradicting compactness of `s` via right-continuity/left-limits; fallback to general theorem:
  have : Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s) := by
    simpa using hs.isBounded_image (f := f)
  exact h_unbounded this

classical
  have hcont : Continuous f := by
    refine continuous_iff_continuousAt.2 ?_
    intro x
    have hright : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
    rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    have hleft : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Iio x) x := by
      have : Tendsto f (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
        simpa [nhdsWithin, comap_inf, comap_principal, inf_assoc, inf_left_comm, inf_comm] using
          (hl.congr' (by
            have : (fun y => f y) = fun y => f y := rfl
            simp [this]))
      simpa [nhdsWithin] using this
    have hwithin : ContinuousWithinAt f ((Set.Iio x) ∪ (Set.Ioi x)) x :=
      hleft.union hright
    have hmem : (x : ι) ∈ (Set.Iio x) ∪ (Set.Ioi x) := by
      simp
    exact hwithin.continuousAt hmem
  simpa [Bornology.isBounded_iff] using (hs.image hcont).isBounded

classical
  by_contra hbounded
  have hnb : ¬ Bornology.IsBounded (range fun x : s => f x) := by
    simpa [range_comp, image_eq_range] using hbounded
  rcases (hs.image (fun x : s => f x)).isBounded_or_exists_tendsto_coe_atTop hnb with h | h
  · exact hnb (by simpa using h)
  · rcases h with ⟨u, huin, a, ha, hut⟩
    have hua : ClusterPt a (map (fun n => (u n : ι)) atTop) := by
      have : Tendsto (fun n => (u n : ι)) atTop (𝓝 a) := ha
      exact this.clusterPt
    have has : a ∈ s := by
      have hclosed : IsClosed s := hs.isClosed
      refine hclosed.mem_of_clusterPt ?_
      simpa [ClusterPt, huin] using hua
    rcases hf.left_limit a with ⟨l, hl⟩
    have hcont : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi a) a := hf.right_continuous a
    have : Tendsto f (𝓝 a) (𝓝 (f a)) := by
      exact (continuousWithinAt_univ.1 (by simpa using hcont)).tendsto
    have htend : Tendsto (fun n => f (u n)) atTop (𝓝 (f a)) := by
      exact (this.comp ha)
    have : Bornology.IsBounded (range fun n => f (u n)) := by
      exact (tendsto_principal.1 (htend.eventually (eventually_mem_nhds_iff.2 ⟨Set.univ, by simp, by simp⟩))).isBounded
    exact hut.not_isBounded (by simpa [range_comp] using this)
